assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a GitHub account and complete the Hello World repository and pull-request workflow in the web UI.

first_success.outcome: A README change created on a branch is merged into the main branch through a pull request.
first_success.observable_signal: The pull request shows Merged and the main branch README contains the committed change.

route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.

candidates.name: Hello World web tutorial
candidates.reason: The browser tutorial teaches the core repository and pull-request workflow without Git, a local checkout, or CLI installation.

candidates.name: Git command-line workflow
candidates.reason: It requires a local Git installation; Hello World explicitly completes the workflow in the browser.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to GitHub.
required_path.observable_result: The GitHub web UI is available.

required_path.action: Create a hello-world repository with a README.
required_path.observable_result: The repository and main branch exist.

required_path.action: Edit README.md and commit the change to readme-edits.
required_path.observable_result: The branch contains the new commit.

required_path.action: Open a pull request from readme-edits to main.
required_path.observable_result: The pull request displays the diff.

required_path.action: Merge the pull request and confirm the change on main.
required_path.observable_result: The pull request is merged and README is updated.

prerequisites.description: A GitHub account and supported browser.

platform_outcomes.description: A README change created on a branch is merged into the main branch through a pull request.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: Account creation can require email verification or anti-abuse checks not enumerated in the tutorial.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
